inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $111482.0M less capital spending $12715.0M ÷ 15014.745M diluted shares per AAPL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251031_rpt20250927_acc0000320193_25_000079.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 free cash flow per share anchors owner cash; Services amortization and buybacks affect GAAP EPS but not the filing-locked cash bridge.

bear.notes: China demand shock, antitrust drag, slower Services mix

base.notes: Mid-cycle iPhone refresh plus high-margin Services growth; modest buyback tailwind

bull.notes: Apple Intelligence monetization and installed-base ARPU lift

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Installed-base ecosystem and deferred Services value not fully separated on balance sheet

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Operating consumer platform; no land-at-zero or royalty reserve pattern

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Services deferred revenue and installed-base monetization in services_installed_base_option

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material private equity stakes disclosed (10-K)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No special dividend or litigation recovery catalyst

growth_explanation.mechanism: Hardware refresh cycles drive unit volume; Services and installed-base monetization lift mix and margin; capital returns reduce share count.
growth_explanation.source: AAPL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251031_rpt20250927_acc0000320193_25_000079.htm disaggregated net sales and cash-flow statement

falsifiers.trigger: Greater China revenue falls more than 10% year-over-year for two consecutive quarters
Services net sales growth falls below 5% year-over-year for four consecutive quarters

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map the core products and services engine, Services installed-base option, net financial claims, and regulatory/cycle reserve once each.

components.label: Core products and services owner-cash engine

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AAPL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251031_rpt20250927_acc0000320193_25_000079.htm: FY2025 revenue $307003.0M, OCF $111482.0M, FCF $98767.0M, Services $109158.0M, cash and securities $132420.0M, total debt $90678.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net cash from operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment
FY2025 diluted shares (net income / diluted EPS)

assumptions.label: Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; buybacks reduce share count but do not change per-share cash generation anchor.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted owner free-cash-flow capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Bear stresses iPhone cycle and China share loss; base mid-cycle seven-year path; bull modest Services mix uplift without peak-cycle heroics.

calculations.label: Core products and services engine per share

components.label: Services installed-base and platform monetization option

valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted incremental installed-base and Services monetization
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on high-margin Services, App Store, and Apple Intelligence monetization beyond normalized hardware free cash flow; base is judgment band.

components.label: Net cash, securities, and debt claims on common equity

assumptions.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating liquidity reserve

components.label: China, antitrust, and hardware cycle stress reserve

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AAPL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251031_rpt20250927_acc0000320193_25_000079.htm: FY2025 revenue $307003.0M, OCF $111482.0M, FCF $98767.0M, Services $109158.0M, cash and securities $132420.0M, total debt $90678.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

assumptions.label: China concentration, antitrust, and iPhone cycle stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for regulatory fines, China demand shocks, and hardware cycle compression not fully embedded in core capitalization multiple.

calculations.label: Regulatory and cycle reserve per share

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AAPL, including core products and services owner cash, Services installed-base option, net financial claims, and regulatory/cycle reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Core owner free cash flow is valued once; Services option, net financial claims, and regulatory reserve are separate additive components with unique overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q filing extracts; GAAP net income is cross-check only for platform compounder.

component_groups.label: Core products and services owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Core products and services owner-cash engine
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.

component_groups.economic_claim: Services installed-base and platform monetization option
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Installed-base monetization through App Store, iCloud, and Apple Intelligence over 3 to 7 years.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from FY2025 Services net sales $109.2B trajectory; Apple does not disclose standalone Apple Intelligence revenue.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Services scale uses existing platform; incremental R&D embedded in consolidated spend.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Core products and services owner-cash engine
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_provenance.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF
method_provenance.equation: cash_t = cash_(t-1)*(1+reinvestment*incremental_ROIC); value = PV(distributable cash + terminal owner earnings)

sources.locator: Owner cash, reinvestment and reverse expectations

Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AAPL, including core products and services owner cash, Services installed-base option, net financial claims, and regulatory/cycle reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Core owner free cash flow is valued once; Services option, net financial claims, and regulatory reserve are separate additive components with unique overlap keys.

economic_value.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q filing extracts; GAAP net income is cross-check only for platform compounder.

component_groups.label: Core products and services owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Core products and services owner-cash engine
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.

component_groups.label: Services installed-base and platform monetization option
component_groups.economic_claim: Services installed-base and platform monetization option
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Installed-base monetization through App Store, iCloud, and Apple Intelligence over 3 to 7 years.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from FY2025 Services net sales $109.2B trajectory; Apple does not disclose standalone Apple Intelligence revenue.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Services scale uses existing platform; incremental R&D embedded in consolidated spend.

component_groups.label: Net cash, securities, and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash, securities, and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.

component_groups.label: China, antitrust, and hardware cycle stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: China, antitrust, and hardware cycle stress reserve
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.

limitations: Services milestone value is judgment-based; deferred Services revenue partially embedded in consolidated free cash flow.
Regulatory and China reserve bands remain widest judgment components.
